# terrible_cisco_dnac_network_device_lexicographically_sorted_info (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against

### Optional

- `associatedWlcIp` (String) AssociatedWlcIp query parameter.
- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `collectionInterval` (String) CollectionInterval query parameter.
- `collectionStatus` (String) CollectionStatus query parameter.
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name→value).
- `errorCode` (String) ErrorCode query parameter.
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `family` (String) Family query parameter.
- `headers` (String) Additional headers.
- `hostname` (String) Hostname query parameter.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `limit` (Number) Limit query parameter. The number of records to show for this page. Min 1, Max 500.
- `macAddress` (String) MacAddress query parameter.
- `managementIpAddress` (String) ManagementIpAddress query parameter.
- `offset` (Number) Offset query parameter.
- `platformId` (String) PlatformId query parameter.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `reachabilityFailureReason` (String) ReachabilityFailureReason query parameter.
- `reachabilityStatus` (String) ReachabilityStatus query parameter.
- `role` (String) Role query parameter.
- `roleSource` (String) RoleSource query parameter.
- `serialNumber` (String) SerialNumber query parameter.
- `series` (String) Series query parameter.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `softwareType` (String) SoftwareType query parameter.
- `softwareVersion` (String) SoftwareVersion query parameter.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `type` (String) Type query parameter.
- `upTime` (String) UpTime query parameter.
- `vrfName` (String) VrfName query parameter.

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `dnac_response` (String) A dictionary or list with the response returned by the Cisco DNAC Python SDK
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
